title: Finalize Snyk ignore skill and apply remaining approved ignores

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Started: finalize skill content for audit-grade ignore rationales (remove process/pilot wording expectations), validate skill, then apply ignore policies for remaining findings already classified as dismiss.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Completed.

Skill finalization:
- Updated `~/.codex/skills/snyk-code-ignore-rationale/SKILL.md` guardrails/output sections to enforce audit-focused rationale and explicitly forbid process/meta wording (pilot/API/scripted/generated).
- Updated `~/.codex/skills/snyk-code-ignore-rationale/references/ignore-template.md` quality bar with the same constraint.
- Revalidated skill: `quick_validate.py` => Skill is valid.
